case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. SCOTT, ANDRE L

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT, ANDRE L $1,219.81 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,317.81
